nextRepoOwnedTasks.reason: Only known owner-input blockers remain in the current truth table.

items.requirement: Private FlowChain node and control-plane services are running and readable.
Block production advances over multiple samples.
Local live-product e2e covers runtime, wallet, live infra, and tester rehearsal without public claims.
Live infrastructure readiness separates repo-owned checks from public owner-input blockers.
Wallet creation and wallet-to-wallet service flow works against the running private service.
Separate tester wallets can transact and observe chain state in local rehearsal.
Owner-provided public RPC, backup, and Base 8453 bridge inputs are configured and valid.
Public FlowChain RPC has URL, TLS acknowledgement, CORS, rate limit, backup path, and response hygiene.
Public RPC validation harness is present and fail-closed before endpoint sharing.
Public RPC abuse harness proves CORS rejection, media-type rejection, malformed JSON handling, batch/body caps, notification handling, rate limiting, and no-secret summaries.
No-secret public RPC deployment bundle exists for HTTPS reverse proxying, verification, and rollback.
Configured production backup path can create and restore manifest-backed state snapshots.
Local backup/restore rehearsal round-trips state and detects corrupt snapshots.
Base 8453 live bridge pilot has required owner inputs, caps, confirmations, and operator acknowledgement.
Bridge infrastructure readiness is safe for external funded testing.
External tester flow remains blocked until public RPC, backup, bridge, and local tester evidence pass.
Friends-and-family tester packet is shareable only after all public gates pass.
Ops snapshot distinguishes critical incidents from expected owner-input blockers and gives incident commands.
Public deployment contract is ready before endpoint exposure or tester packet sharing.
System architecture audit covers local runtime, public RPC, backup, bridge, tester, and no-secret gates.
Completion audit is fresh and is the release gate for claiming production readiness.
Generated reports, docs, and packets contain no secrets or owner-provided values.
